testcase.name: TutorPutor smoke tests › dashboard shell loads
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › smoke.spec.ts:12:3 › TutorPutor smoke tests › dashboard shell loads ─────────────────

testcase.name: TutorPutor smoke tests › platform health endpoint is available
TutorPutor smoke tests › unknown routes do not resolve to retired learner flows
